name: search-content
description: Search screen text, audio transcriptions, input events, and memories. Returns timestamped results with app context. IMPORTANT: prefer activity-summary for broad questions ('what was I doing?'). Use search-content only when you need specific text/content. Start with limit=5, increase only if needed. Results can be large — use max_content_length=500 to truncate.

q.description: Full-text search query. Omit to return all content in time range. Avoid for audio — transcriptions are noisy, q filters too aggressively.

content_type.description: Filter by content type. 'accessibility' is preferred for screen text (OS-native). 'ocr' is fallback for apps without accessibility support. Default: 'all'.

limit.description: Max results (default 10, max 20). Start with 5 for exploration.

offset.description: Pagination offset. Use when results say 'use offset=N for more'.

start_time.description: ISO 8601 UTC or relative (e.g. '2h ago', '1d ago'). Always provide to avoid scanning entire history.

end_time.description: ISO 8601 UTC or relative (e.g. 'now'). Defaults to now.

app_name.description: Filter by app name (e.g. 'Google Chrome', 'Slack', 'zoom.us'). Case-sensitive.

include_frames.description: Include base64 screenshots (OCR only). Warning: large response.

speaker_ids.description: Comma-separated speaker IDs to filter audio

speaker_name.description: Filter audio by speaker name (case-insensitive partial match)

max_content_length.description: Truncate each result's text via middle-truncation. Use 200-500 to keep responses compact.
